narrative.summary: Korean-style cake café with cloud-like confections; 4.8 rating with early fans. Quiet gem on Dundas W for soft pastry lovers.

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "The Strawberry Matcha Latte was creamy and perfectly sweet, and the Matcha Brownie Basque Cheesecake exceeded my expectations! Must try duo 🍵🍰

The cafe is simple and cute with soft music playing in the background. There’s also spacious seating, perfect to work/study from.

Also the owners and staff are incredibly sweet! They added extra seating to accommodate us as the cafe was super busy, and we were very appreciative ❤️ Excited to come back and try other drinks and desserts!"

⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Follow @__homekong__ for more ✨

This is a new café that just opened recently ~
I love the interior — it really gives you that Korea vibe. Aesthetic, minimalist, and super cozy (but yes… it gets very busy on weekends 😂).

I tried their Earl Grey cake and Matcha Brownie cake.
Between the two, I definitely prefer the Matcha Brownie — it has a rich matcha flavour and the dark brownie base balances the sweetness perfectly 🍵🤎

The Earl Grey cake is good too, but the texture is a bit too moist for my personal taste. The Earl Grey flavour is strong though, so if you love Earl Grey, you’ll probably enjoy it more than I did!

Save this spot for your next cozy café day 🤍"

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "There was an unfortunate mix up on dates for our cake order yesterday. The team was beyond kind and sweet in resolving this. They were able to provide us with a christmas cake super last minute which also tasted amazing as usual. We’ve loved their cakes even back when they were operating out of a different location and teaching various cake classes. I can’t recommend and thank them enough for all the kindness. We can’t wait to order more in the future."
